name: Ohio Teamsters
description_short: Ohio Teamsters Credit Union is a member-owned, federally insured credit union serving Teamsters and their families with loans, savings, and checking accounts since 1940.
description_long:
Ohio Teamsters Credit Union traces its origins to 1940 as an informal service to Bakery Drivers Local 52, beginning as handwritten records in the pocket of Albert Young, Local 52 President. With encouragement from International President James R. Hoffa and Joint Council 41 leadership, the organization expanded significantly in 1953, becoming Cleveland Teamsters Credit Union before being renamed Ohio Teamsters Credit Union in 1965. The credit union has maintained steady growth, reaching $13 million in assets and serving approximately 7,000 members nationwide as of their last reported figures.

Ohio Teamsters Credit Union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including personal loans, home mortgage loans, savings accounts, checking accounts, and credit cards. Members can access their accounts through online home banking, utilize a free ATM locator network, and apply for loans directly through their website. The credit union also provides ancillary services such as ID theft protection products, financial calculators, and Sallie Mae student loan servicing. All member deposits are federally insured by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA).

As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, Ohio Teamsters operates on a not-for-profit, member-owned model, meaning profits are typically returned to members through better rates and lower fees. The organization has deep roots in the Teamsters labor movement, having originated specifically to serve union members and their families. Their longevity—over 85 years of continuous operation—and steady asset growth demonstrate institutional stability and member trust.

Potential members should note that the website provides limited specific information about current loan rates, APRs, savings rates, or membership eligibility requirements. While they advertise loan products and rates pages, the actual rate details are not displayed on the publicly available website content. Prospective members will need to contact the credit union directly at (216) 573-6700 or (800) 909-6828 to obtain specific terms and verify membership eligibility, which may be restricted to Teamsters union members or their families.
services: Online home banking and account enrollment
Free ATM locator and ATM network access
pros: NCUA federal insurance protects all member deposits, ensuring account safety up to applicable limits
Not-for-profit structure means earnings are returned to members through competitive rates and lower fees
Long operational history since 1940 demonstrates stability and understanding of member financial needs
Online home banking enrollment and free ATM locator provide convenient account access and cash withdrawal options
Comprehensive product suite includes personal loans, mortgages, savings, checking, and credit cards in one institution
Toll-free number (800) 909-6828 provides nationwide member support beyond local Cleveland area
Direct loan application capability available through website for streamlined member access
cons: Website does not display current loan rates, APRs, or savings rates—members must call to comparison shop
Membership eligibility unclear from website; likely restricted to Teamsters union members or their families, limiting accessibility
Limited online functionality described; no mention of mobile app, mobile banking, or advanced digital services compared to larger institutions
Asset size of $13 million is significantly smaller than major credit unions, potentially limiting product breadth and service capabilities
No specific information provided about minimum account balances, membership fees, or account requirements
best_for: Teamsters union members and their families seeking member-owned financial services with union roots
Individuals prioritizing not-for-profit institutions and wanting earnings returned as member benefits
Borrowers interested in personal loans and mortgages from a locally-based Cleveland financial institution
diagnosis: Ohio Teamsters Credit Union is best suited for union members and their families seeking traditional credit union services with a 85+ year track record rooted in the labor movement. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility and current rates require direct contact with the credit union, as the website provides limited specificity on terms, making online comparison shopping difficult.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Ohio Teamsters — INDEPENDENCE, OH Credit Union | CreditDoc
meta_description: Ohio Teamsters — NCUA-insured credit union in INDEPENDENCE, OH. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
